summary:
Tumor cells in CLL/SLL originate from mature B cells due to specific markers such as CD5 positivity observed via flow cytometry; these cells represent a functional subset distinctively different from immature counterparts. Thus, \boxed{A}. 

This summary captures both critical aspects—maturity level and marker specificity—that define how tumor cell origins should be understood for this condition.
